scope_note: Attention Spectral Gain Cert family [99]: derives the curvature gain from sigma_max(QK^T/sqrt(d_k)) — the natural Lipschitz constant of the scaled-dot-product attention score map — via power iteration on A^T A. Gain is the spectral norm of the attention score matrix, not a free witness. Pins H_QA substrate formula, update rule p_after = p_before - lr*sigma_max*H_QA*grad, and kappa = 1 - |1 - lr*sigma_max*H_QA|.
